case_title: GEICO INDEMNITY COMPANY VS. ANTONIA WILLIAMS et al

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-05-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANTONIA WILIAMS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
